rules.name: High CX Risk Score
rules.reason: Customer experience risk score is significantly above the acceptable threshold.

rules.name: Social Sentiment Mismatch Positive-Neutral
rules.reason: Social sentiment does not align with customer reviews, signaling potential misalignment between perceived and actual product experience.

rules.name: Social Sentiment Mismatch Negative-Positive
rules.reason: Contradictory social sentiment and customer review sentiment may confuse potential consumers.

rules.name: Underclaimed ROAS by Platform
rules.reason: Reported Return on Ad Spend (ROAS) by platform is underclaimed, suggesting issues with attribution measurement.

rules.name: Crisis Blindspot - High Ad Spend with Negative Feedback
rules.reason: Significant ad spend with negative customer ratings indicates a mismatch between marketing efforts and customer satisfaction.

rules.name: Overall Positive Health Signal for SKU
rules.reason: All key performance indicators show a positive evaluation for the SKU, suggesting a successful launch template.

rules.name: High Social to Acquisition Rate
rules.reason: Effective conversion from social reach indicates efficient campaign performance.

rules.name: Positive NPS with Healthy Sales
rules.reason: High Net Promoter Scores and unit sales reflect strong customer satisfaction and market demand.

rules.name: Neutral Social Sentiment with Positive Customer Sentiment
rules.reason: Social media content may not fully capture the positive experiences of customers, potentially impacting brand image.

rules.name: Underclaimed ROAS Significant Gap
rules.reason: A significant discrepancy exists between reported and true ROAS, indicating a need for review of attribution metrics.

rules.name: High Risk with Active Ad Status
rules.reason: Ad campaigns are running despite high customer experience risk, risking further customer dissatisfaction.

rules.name: Inconsistent Sentiment Indicators
rules.reason: Inconsistent sentiment across different platforms requires alignment to maintain a coherent brand image.
